Win a Date with Tad Hamilton! (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,980,098Details
International Box Office $609,731
Worldwide Box Office $17,589,829
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,320,066 (43.1% of total gross)
Legs:2.32 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:96.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$24,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,711 opening theaters/2,808 max. theaters, 2.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $32,702,407

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 23rd, 2004 (Wide) by Dreamworks SKG
International Releases: April 8th, 2004 (Limited), released as Win a Date with Tad Hamilton (Australia)
Video Release: April 20th, 2004 by Dreamworks Video
MPA Rating: PG-13
Running Time: 96 minutes
Plot point: Romance
Target audience: Tween
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
